ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Continued To May-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 7, 1999 and admitted to probate in Wisconsin is admitted to probate in California. Sally A. Ebben is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for March 24, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
